voice: Warm, sensory, relaxed-luxury and confident; never pushy or generic.
visual_direction: Turquoise water, warm sunset, coral accents, linen textures and candid holiday moments. Natural light; no heavy filters.
cadence: Four to six weekly posts; Reels lead discovery, carousels earn saves, images maintain brand presence. Test 20:00 Africa/Cairo.
hashtag_rules: Use 5-7 relevant tags: 2 branded, 2 destination, 1-3 experience. Never repeat an identical set all week.
guardrails: Do not invent prices, availability, awards or guest claims.
Arabic copy must be adapted naturally, not directly translated.
A human must approve every external publication.
